channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Not a Time for Arms Control With North Korea
item.description: The U.S. proposal of arms control, were it to happen, will undo the current structure of deterrence against North Korea’s nuclear threats. It will convince North Korea that its nuclear ambitions have been vindicated as the right course of action and lead it to demand a heavy price.

item.title: Antelope Reef Could Now Be the Largest Island in the South China Sea
item.description: China’s land reclamation reaches an unprecedented scale.
